title: [kimi-review] 16071f4: [SEVERITY: high] **The claimed fix is not in this commit.**
description:
Commit: 16071f4c3
Message: fix(senml): validate u64 in dec_int for negative CBOR

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **The claimed fix is not in this commit.** The message and close_reason state that `cbor.rs:252` now validates `val <= i64::MAX` before the cast/negation in `dec_int`, but the diff touches only `.beads/issues/project-LICHEN-65td.json`. No source file is modified, so the wrapping/overflow bug when decoding large negative CBOR integers (`-1 - n` where `n > i64::MAX`) remains unfixed.
